diagrams.title: Readers-Writers Problem States
diagrams.description: State diagram showing how readers and writers interact with a shared file
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the synchronization states and transitions in the readers-writers problem

diagrams.title: Deadlock Cycle
diagrams.description: Circular wait diagram showing deadlock between two processes holding and waiting for locks
elements: Process P1 holding Lock A, waiting for Lock B
Process P2 holding Lock B, waiting for Lock A
Circular arrow showing the dependency cycle
diagrams.purpose: Understand deadlock formation in file locking scenarios

diagrams.title: Copy-on-Write Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of COW technique showing when actual copying occurs
elements: Initial state: Process A and B share same memory pages
Write attempt by Process A triggers copy
Process A gets private copy, B continues sharing original
Both processes now have independent data
diagrams.purpose: Understand deferred copying mechanism in COW file sharing
